name: Global Sevilla School

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Kembangan Raya Blok JJ No.1, Puri Indah, West Jakarta 11610, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Global Sevilla is a Cambridge school with two campuses in Puri Indah (West Jakarta) and Pulo Mas (East Jakarta), making it accessible to families across the city.
paragraphs: Global Sevilla is a Cambridge school with two campuses in Puri Indah (West Jakarta) and Pulo Mas (East Jakarta), making it accessible to families across the city.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$3.7K – US$11K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Swimming pool, Basketball courts, Soccer field, Sports hall, Science laboratories.
